message:
test(proptest): add property tests for dashboard TUI adapter (ft-3hbv9)

8 property tests (behind tui/ftui features) + 1 placeholder for
default features. Tests: adapter never panics, health label matches
tier, cost/rate-limit row counts bounded, quota block rate valid,
summary line format, backpressure utilization bounded, determinism.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
